title: angelica tenuisecta
intro: Angelica tenuisecta is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelica tenuisecta include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical use, and it can also be dried and made into capsules for internal consumption.
